title: A Study on Level of Satisfaction towards Shakti Scheme (Free Bus Scheme) Among Women's in Sira taluk of Karnataka.
author: Vijayakumar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Abstract:    
      The aim, of this research is to study the effect of the government Shakti scheme on women and students. This research contributes to the ongoing discourse in the society   impact on   transportation   policies shedding light on   the complexities surrounding free travel schemes and their potential to empower women in society. This primary research employs a mixed method approach   combining quantitative data analysis of   the questionnaire responses with qualitative data gathered through open-ended-questions. The questionnaire is designed to capture data on various aspects including utilization of the free travel scheme   and their perceptions   of   its impact on   their lives. The study   aims   to reach   a diverse sample of women and students with the sample size of 200.
